decks.notes: This Sultai Control deck focuses on utilizing a combination of removal spells, counterspells, card draw, and powerful creatures to disrupt and outvalue the opponent. By controlling the board through removal spells like Deceit and Requiting Hex, countering key threats with Emeritus of Ideation, and generating card advantage with Wistfulness and Bitter Triumph, the deck aims to grind out the opponent's resources. With a mix of powerful finishers like Oildeep Gearhulk and Overlord of the Balemurk, as well as versatile spells like Day of Black Sun and Stock Up, the deck aims to dominate the late game and secure victory.

This deck focuses on quickly bringing out aggressive creatures and utilizing spells that boost their abilities while punishing the opponent. The goal is to overwhelm the opponent with a fast and powerful offense, taking advantage of the synergy between creatures and spells. By combining speed and power, this deck aims to control the board and deal damage swiftly before the opponent can mount a defense. Additionally, the deck utilizes a mix of colors to access different types of spells and creatures, creating a versatile and formidable strategy.

The main concept of this Azorius Aggro deck is to quickly establish board presence with low-cost flying creatures like Momo, Friendly Flier and Sage of the Skies, while utilizing support cards like Springleaf Drum and Starfield Shepherd to buff and protect your creatures. Quantum Riddler and Aang, Swift Savior provide additional aggression and evasion, while cards like Erode and Practiced Offense help to disrupt the opponent's game plan. By curving out efficiently and leveraging the Flying mechanic, this deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a steady stream of damage before they can stabilize.

This deck focuses on quickly dropping low-cost, evasive creatures like Elusive Otter and Eddymurk Crab, then buffing them with spells like Burst Lightning and Stormchaser's Talent to deal damage to the opponent swiftly. The deck also includes cards like Secret Identity and Flow State to protect your creatures and disrupt your opponent's strategy. With a mix of quick creatures, direct damage spells, and card draw, this deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with aggressive plays and efficient tempo. The mana base includes a mix of Islands, Riverpyre Verge, and dual lands to ensure consistent casting of spells.

This control deck focuses on card advantage, removal, and countering opponent's spells to maintain board control. Using a combination of card draw, board wipes, and permission spells, the deck aims to outvalue and outlast the opponent. Tablet of Discovery and Stock Up help with card advantage, while Jeskai Revelation provides a big boost in resources. The deck also includes a variety of removal spells like Inevitable Defeat and Thunder Magic to handle threats. With strong control elements and powerful finishers like Swallowed by Leviathan, the deck aims to grind out victories through resource management and precise decision-making.

The main concept of this deck is to quickly build up a board of flying creatures and use powerful support cards to overwhelm the opponent with aggressive attacks. By utilizing cards like Quantum Riddler and Starfield Shepherd alongside cards that buff and protect your creatures like Daydream and Practiced Offense, you can deal significant damage early on in the game. The deck also includes a mix of powerful legendary creatures like Momo and Haliya to provide additional power and versatility to your attacks. Additionally, the inclusion of cards like Erode and Seam Rip allows you to disrupt your opponent's strategy and maintain control of the battlefield.

This deck focuses on quickly establishing a board presence and dealing damage to the opponent as efficiently as possible. It utilizes cheap spells and creatures to control the board and apply pressure early in the game. The deck aims to use tempo advantage and card advantage to overwhelm the opponent and secure a victory before the opponent can stabilize. With a mix of burn spells, creatures, and counterspells, this deck is designed to be fast-paced and aggressive, punishing opponents who are unable to keep up with its relentless assault.

This Jeskai Control deck focuses on card advantage, removal, and controlling the board. By using Tablet of Discovery and Accumulate Wisdom, the player can draw cards consistently and outvalue their opponent. Combustion Technique and Firebending Lesson provide removal and board control, while Jeskai Revelation allows for massive card draw and life gain. Consult the Star Charts and Three Steps Ahead offer additional card selection, while Price of Freedom can potentially be a game-ending finisher. The deck also includes some versatile spells like Flashback and Ill-Timed Explosion for added flexibility.

The main concept of this deck is to build a strong board presence quickly by playing efficient creatures and utilizing combat tricks to control the battlefield. The deck aims to put pressure on the opponent early in the game and maintain that advantage through a mix of aggressive creatures and disruptive spells. By combining the speed and power of Azorius creatures with strategic spell choices, the deck aims to overwhelm opponents and secure victories through combat damage. Additionally, the deck includes land cards that provide flexibility and consistency in mana production.

This deck focuses on utilizing a combination of efficient creatures and disruptive spells to put pressure on the opponent and control the board. By quickly deploying threats like Dream Beavers and Floodpits Drowner, along with using cards like Requiting Hex and The Last Ronin's Technique to disrupt the opponent's strategy, it aims to win the game swiftly. Additionally, the deck includes powerful finishers like Kaito, Bane of Nightmares to close out games. The mana base is optimized to support the aggressive game plan, with a mix of multicolor lands to ensure consistency in casting spells.

The main focus of this deck is to control the game by utilizing a combination of removal spells and counterspells to disrupt the opponent's game plan. By using cards like Abandon Attachments, Spell Pierce, and Boomerang Basics, the deck aims to maintain board control and prevent the opponent from establishing a strong presence on the battlefield. Additionally, the deck includes cards like Monument to Endurance and Accumulate Wisdom to generate card advantage and outvalue the opponent over time. Overall, the deck prioritizes controlling the game tempo and outmaneuvering the opponent through careful resource management and strategic play.

The main concept of this deck is to create a fast-paced and aggressive strategy using Blue and Red cards. The focus is on quickly playing creatures like Slickshot Show-Off and Elusive Otter to deal damage to the opponent. Burst Lightning and other direct damage spells are used to control the board and push through for lethal attacks. The deck also includes bounce and counterspells to disrupt the opponent's game plan. Overall, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a combination of creatures, burn spells, and card advantage.

This Selesnya Aggro deck focuses on quickly building a board presence with efficient creatures like Badgermole Cub and Sazh's Chocobo, supported by ramp from Llanowar Elves. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a mix of creatures with various abilities and power levels. Earthbender Ascension provides additional power boosts, while Erode and other removal spells help keep the opponent's board in check. The deck also includes some resilient threats like Dyadrine, Synthesis Amalgam and Mossborn Hydra to ensure continuous pressure on the opponent.

This Sultai Control deck focuses on utilizing a combination of disruption, card draw, and powerful win conditions to control the game. By playing a mix of removal spells, counter spells, and card advantage, the deck aims to outvalue and outmaneuver opponents while eventually overwhelming them with threats like Emeritus of Abundance and The Dawning Archaic. The deck also includes a strong land base to support its three-color mana requirements and provide utility with cards like Gloomlake Verge and Great Hall of the Biblioplex.

This Sultai Control deck focuses on using a combination of powerful creatures and disruptive spells to control the game and outvalue the opponent. With a mix of removal spells, card draw, and versatile threats, the deck aims to keep the opponent on the back foot while steadily building up its own resources. Utilizing a blend of creature abilities and spell effects, the deck can grind out victories through attrition and carefully calculated plays, making each decision crucial to success.

This deck revolves around using cards like Bringer of the Last Gift and Awaken the Honored Dead to quickly reanimate powerful creatures like Overlord of the Balemurk and Superior Spider-Man. Cards like Deceit and Formidable Speaker allow for quick setup and protection of your reanimation strategy. The deck also includes cards like Wistfulness and Bitter Triumph to disrupt your opponent's strategy and gain an advantage. Your primary goal is to overwhelm your opponent with big, impactful creatures while controlling the game with powerful spells and abilities.
